novel_features.name: Cross-video transcript search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across every cached clip transcript in your workspace; returns video, clip, and timecode hits in milliseconds.

novel_features.name: Watch-milestone digest
novel_features.description: Roll up webhook view-milestone events into a per-video summary over a window (e.g. who crossed 75% in the last 7 days).

novel_features.name: Webhook tail + replay
novel_features.description: Stream new webhook events from the inbox to stdout, and replay any prior message to a local URL with valid HMAC headers — no public tunnel needed.

novel_features.name: Bulk standard edit pass
novel_features.description: Apply a chained set of edits (remove-fillers, trim-silences-gt N, blur preset) across every clip in a playlist in one command.

novel_features.name: Transcript diff (cut vs uncut)
novel_features.description: Diff a clip's cut transcript against its uncut transcript to surface every word that editing removed (filler, silence, hand-edit) with timecodes.

novel_features.name: Exports waitlist
novel_features.description: Kick off exports for one or more videos and block until each is ready, short-circuiting on the Export ready webhook event.

novel_features.name: Caption-file export
novel_features.description: Format a clip's cut transcript as an SRT or VTT subtitle file ready to attach to an embed or upload.

novel_features.name: Workspace stats
novel_features.description: Local aggregate of video count, clip count, total duration, transcript word count, and export count by month across the cached workspace.
